reviews.comment:
Una mala onda total. Como socio del ACA lamento lo que está pasando, en todo el país es igual. Siempre alguna mala experiencia te llevás.

(Translated by Google)
It's a total bummer. As an ACA member, I'm sorry about what's happening; it's the same all over the country. You always end up having some kind of bad experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNucjRPTXJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace unos dias me perdi por allá a la noche y le pedi al playero se la noche si me podria ayudar y no lo quiso hacerlo. Y eso q yo le dije q no sabia a donde estaba, qué tenia él celular sin carga y qué no soy por la zona! No me quiso ni decir qué hora era como para yo saber. La verdad una vergüenza, me dio mucho miedo q me pasase algo y le transmití mi preocupación y nada. Una falta de empatía importante. Por suerte pude llegar a la casa de mi novio.

(Translated by Google)
A few days ago I got lost one night and asked the beach attendant if he could help me, but he refused. Even though I told him I didn't know where I was, that my phone was dead, and that I wasn't from the area! He wouldn't even tell me what time it was so I could know. It was truly shameful; I was terrified something would happen to me, and I expressed my concern, but he did nothing. A serious lack of empathy. Luckily, I managed to get to my boyfriend's house.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuM3Rua1pREAE

reviews.comment:
Renovado y actualizado lugar. Cuenta con sección camping para socios del ACA, boxes de taller. Muy completo.

(Translated by Google)
Renovated and updated facility. It features a camping area for ACA members and workshop bays. Very complete.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNucHZULTV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, muy rico el café y  limpio el baño de damas pero... no cierra la puerta de ninguno de los cuatro boxes.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, the coffee was delicious and the ladies' restroom was clean, but... the door to any of the four stalls doesn't close.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuM0pmaG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gran lugar para hacer una parada técnica a comer o cargar nafta.
La playa es muy grande con muchísimo lugar para estacionar y espacio para maniobrar.
El shop también es muy grande y con muchas mesas, también tiene mesas afuera. La atención de las chicas del shop más o menos, bastante desgano.
Los baños estaban algo sucios y descuidados.
Al estar pegado a la autopista queda ideal para no desviarse mucho si necesitas frenar.

(Translated by Google)
Great place to make a pit stop for food or gas.
The parking lot is very large with plenty of space to park and maneuver.
The convenience store is also very large with many tables, including outdoor seating. The service from the staff was so-so, rather unenthusiastic.
The restrooms were somewhat dirty and neglected.
Being right next to the highway makes it ideal for minimizing your detour if you need to stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuNEpyVld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, muy limpio y ordenado todo el lugar, buen parador en viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the whole place was very clean and tidy, a good place to stop while traveling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURId2N2WGpRRRAB

Excellent service and very clean bathrooms!

(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIN08ya3J3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En verdad, luego de más de 30 años de ser socio del ACA, NUNCA ME TRATARON TAN MAL COMO EN ESTA ESTACIÓN DE SERVICIO. Antes me callaba la boca ahora no tolero más esa prepotencia y mala predisposición. Además siendo las 20 horas no se encontraba ningún encargado con quién poder hablar.

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, after more than 30 years as an ACA member, I have NEVER been treated so badly as at this gas station. Before, I kept quiet, but now I can no longer tolerate that arrogance and ill will. Furthermore, at 8 PM there was no one in charge to speak to.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIMnRuME9REAE

reviews.comment:
El predio abierto de atrás es ideal para pasar un buen rato, si andas de viaje. Los baños están siempre limpios y con papel. Hay máquinas de agua caliente y de hielo.

(Translated by Google)
The open area in the back is ideal for relaxing if you're traveling. The restrooms are always clean and stocked with toilet paper. There are hot water and ice machines.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIejg2RkhBEAE
